data.content_ref: inline:{"tour":["0","7","4","1","3","2","13","8","6","11","9","12","10","5"],"rationale":"Atypical low-to-high sweep: start by jumping south to 7/4/1, climb the northern spine 3/2/13/8/6, then traverse eastern cities 11/9/12/10/5; deliberately trades local optimality for a monotone-style ordering."}
